id.description: Unique identifier for this photo in the timeline.

source.description: Whether this photo comes from a linked album or a direct post upload.

albumName.description: Album name when source is 'album'; null otherwise.

linkId.description: Famlin-side link id when source is 'album'; null otherwise.

assetId.description: Provider-defined asset id when source is 'album'; null otherwise.

postId.description: Post id when source is 'post', or — for source 'album' — the id of a post that embeds this asset via its media-proxy URL; null when no post references the photo.

postAssetUrl.description: Only on source 'album' items that a post embeds: the verbatim media-proxy URL stored in that post's uploadedAssetUrls, usable as the assetUrl when pinning comments to this photo. Null otherwise.

nextCursor.description: Pass back as ?cursor= for the next page; null on the last page.
